component.name: StatusBarGroup
component.script:
sub init() print "StatusBarGroup: init()" m.progressRect = m.top.findNode("progressFill") m.tickerLabel = m.top.findNode("tickerLabel") m.sectionLabel = m.top.findNode("sectionCountLabel") m.countdownLabel = m.top.findNode("countdownLabel") m.progressTrack = m.top.findNode("progressTrack") end sub
sub onProgressChange(event as Object) pct = event.getData() if pct < 0 then pct = 0 if pct > 100 then pct = 100 ' Progress bar fill: max width = 900px fillWidth = int((pct / 100.0) * 900) if fillWidth < 4 then fillWidth = 4 m.progressRect.width = fillWidth ' Colour shifts cyan->magenta across progress if pct < 50 m.progressRect.color = "0x00FFFFFF" else m.progressRect.color = "0xFF00FFFF" end if end sub
sub onTickerTextChange(event as Object) m.tickerLabel.text = event.getData() end sub
sub onSectionCountChange(event as Object) count = event.getData() m.sectionLabel.text = "Sections: " + mid(stri(count), 2) end sub
sub onCountdownChange(event as Object) secs = event.getData() mins = int(secs / 60) s = secs - (mins * 60) pad = "" if s < 10 then pad = "0" m.countdownLabel.text = "[TMR] " + mid(stri(mins), 2) + ":" + pad + mid(stri(s), 2) end sub
